zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas de Englefield於1378年出生在英國奧可福爾利可特時，他的父親Philip de Englefield31歲，母親Joan Coffin26歲。他於1399年與Joane de Rycote在英國奧可福爾格亞特 哈瑟利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1415年4月1日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾格亞特 哈瑟利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Englefield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from either of two places called Englefield (in Berks and Surrey).  Compare  Inglefield  .

variants.name: Inglefield
meanings: English: locative name from Englefield (Surrey), recorded as Ingelfeld in 1282, or Englefield (Berks).

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas de Englefield was born in 1378, in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Philip de Englefield, was 31 and his mother, Joan Coffin, was 26. He married Joane de Rycote in 1399, in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died on 1 April 1415, in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas d’Englefield est né en 1378, à Rycote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Philip d’Englefield, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Joan Coffin, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Joane de Rycote en 1399, à Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1415, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas de Englefield 1378 in Rycote, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip de Englefield 31 und seine Mutter Joan Coffin 26. Er hat 1399 in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England Joane de Rycote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1415 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joane de Rycote nel 1399, nel Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì il 1 aprile 1415, nel Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Englefieldが1378年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアリコトで生まれた時，父Philip de Englefieldは31歳，母Joan Coffinは26歳であった。1399年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアグレアト ハセリーでJoane de Rycoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1415年4月1日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアグレアト ハセリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas de Englefield(이)가 1378년 영국 스퍼드실르 리컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip de Englefield(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Coffin(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 스퍼드실르 그리트 하셀이에서 Joane de Rycote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1415년 4월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 그리트 하셀이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas de Englefield nasceu em 1378, em Rycote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Philip de Englefield, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Joan Coffin, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Joane de Rycote em 1399, em Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1 de abril de 1415, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas de Englefield родился в 1378 г. в местности рикот, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Philip de Englefield было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Joan Coffin, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Joane de Rycote в 1399 г. в местности грит хеисели, оксфордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер 1 апреля 1415 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности грит хеисели, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Joane de Rycote en 1399, en Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 1 de abril de 1415, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en Great Haseley, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
